nasb.text: and Hashabiah and Jeshaiah of the sons of Merari, with his brothers and their sons, 20 men;

esv.text: also Hashabiah, and with him Jeshaiah of the sons of Merari, with his kinsmen and their sons, 20;

cnv.text: 又有哈沙比雅和與他在一起的米拉利的子孫耶篩亞，以及他的兄弟和他們的兒子共二十人。

ccb.text: 他们还带来哈沙比雅和米拉利的子孙耶筛亚，以及哈沙比雅的弟兄和儿子共二十人。
